## The workflow

<!-- What you're trying to do, not just the feature. "Spotting a 5xx
     spike across 3 nginx servers and drilling into the surrounding
     requests" is easier to act on than "add cross-source correlation". -->

## What you tried

<!-- How are you doing it today? grep / less / jq covering 80% of it?
     What's the remaining 20% that mgi-pulse could fill? -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- If you have a shape in mind — a new flag, a keybinding, a panel —
     describe it. Doesn't have to be the final design. -->

## Out of scope

     conversation focused. -->
